stacks.title: Ship a feature
stacks.description: PRD → issues → specs → implement → QA → review → release notes.

stacks.title: Run a campaign
stacks.description: Brief → competitive intel → copy → review → schedule → publish → digest.

stacks.title: Agency client delivery
stacks.description: Kickoff brief → creative → deck → schedule → status report.

stacks.title: Support ticket flow
stacks.description: Triage → KB match → macro or escalation draft.

stacks.title: Legal matter review
stacks.description: Case analysis → doc review → redaction → drafting.

stacks.title: Sales outbound
stacks.description: Lead score → research → personalized sequence → call prep → debrief.

stacks.title: DevOps incident
stacks.description: Alert triage → runbook match → IC aide → postmortem → action tracker.

stacks.title: Doc-bridge memory pipeline
stacks.description: Dogfood: scan corpus → classify memory candidates → handoff → promote to public docs.

stacks.title: Registry growth loop
stacks.description: Dogfood: draft new agent spec → scaffold → eval author → playbook alignment check.

stacks.title: LGPD compliance pack
stacks.description: LGPD assessment → DPA review → retention plan → breach notification draft (BR).

stacks.title: Hire a role
stacks.description: JD → screen → interview bank → debrief → offer.

agents.title: Brief Generator
agents.description: Drafts a TYPED creative brief from client kickoff notes (client/product, audience, insight, proposition, mandatories, tone, deliverables, timeline). Pulls facts only from the notes — never invents; gaps become 'to be confirmed' and are listed in toBeConfirmed. Always a draft.

agents.title: Client Status Report
agents.description: Client Status Report — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Copy Reviewer
agents.description: Reads draft creative against a brand-voice guide and returns TYPED misalignments (line, current text, suggested rewrite, rationale) + an overall assessment. Suggests, never imposes (never rewrites the whole piece); contentious brand-intent calls set routeToHuman for the account lead.

agents.title: Creative QA Checklist
agents.description: Creative QA Checklist — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Deck Builder
agents.description: Drafts a TYPED pitch/status deck (typed slides with bullets + citations) from project artifacts. Every number must cite its source artifact — uncited metrics are flagged in uncitedMetrics, missing data becomes 'data to be confirmed'. Configurable sections; always a draft.

agents.title: Media Plan Builder
agents.description: Media Plan Builder — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Production Timeline
agents.description: Production Timeline — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Revision Tracker
agents.description: Revision Tracker — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Schedule Planner
agents.description: Drafts a TYPED multi-channel publish schedule (date/channel/asset/rationale) from approved drafts + channel constraints. Flags conflicts (window collisions, embargoes, frequency-cap breaches) instead of silently dropping items; never schedules jobs itself — always requiresApproval by the account lead.

agents.title: Scope Creep Detector
agents.description: Scope Creep Detector — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: SOW Drafter
agents.description: SOW Drafter — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Vendor RFP Scorer
agents.description: Vendor RFP Scorer — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Adverse Event Reporter
agents.description: Adverse Event Reporter — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Billing Code Suggester
agents.description: Billing Code Suggester — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Care Plan Author
agents.description: Care Plan Author — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Chart Redactor
agents.description: Redacts HIPAA identifiers from a clinical chart with a DETERMINISTIC backstop: the model does the bulk redaction, then createPIIRedactor re-scans and strips any structured identifier it missed (email/phone/SSN + your MRN/DOB rules) — the emitted chart is always clean of those patterns regardless of the model. Clinical findings preserved.

agents.title: Discharge Summary
agents.description: Discharge Summary — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Formulary Checker
agents.description: Formulary Checker — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Intake Triage
agents.description: Classifies an inbound patient message by urgency (emergency/urgent/routine/administrative/unclear) and routes it — typed output with a DETERMINISTIC red-flag safety net: chest pain / stroke / suicidal ideation / severe bleeding force 'emergency' regardless of the model (the model can only escalate, never downgrade). Unclear/emergency → human triage.

agents.title: Lab Interpreter
agents.description: Lab Interpreter — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Medication Reconciliation
agents.description: Medication Reconciliation — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: SOAP Generator
agents.description: Converts clinician dictation into a TYPED SOAP note (Subjective/Objective/Assessment/Plan) via structured output; preserves facts verbatim, surfaces missing sections instead of inventing them, always a draft for clinician sign-off.

agents.title: Patient Summary
agents.description: Drafts a TYPED one-page pre-visit summary from chart excerpts (reason, active problems, meds, allergies, vitals trend, follow-ups, open questions); never invents values, always a draft for clinician confirmation.

agents.title: Prior Auth Pack
agents.description: Prior Auth Pack — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Referral Router
agents.description: Routes a referral packet to the receiving specialty + urgency with typed output. Incomplete packets are NOT assigned — missing critical fields (reason/meds/prior workup) are surfaced and the case escalates to a human coordinator. Fail-safe on error.

agents.title: Telehealth Intake
agents.description: Telehealth Intake — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Trial Eligibility
agents.description: Trial Eligibility — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Code Review
agents.description: Deep, low-noise code review: 7 focused lenses (correctness, security, performance, maintainability, design, tests, conventions) fan out per file, then every finding is adversarially verified before thresholds apply. Typed findings with applicable patches. Inputs: local git diff, GitHub PR, files, or a snippet. Outputs: Markdown, SARIF, or PR comments. Blocking CI gate.

env.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env.description: Or any provider key your adapter needs.

env.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
env.description: Needed only for the github-pr source and the GitHub reporters.

agents.title: Accessibility Auditor
agents.description: Accessibility Auditor — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: API Contract Reviewer
agents.description: API Contract Reviewer — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Changelog from Commits
agents.description: Changelog from Commits — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Code QA
agents.description: Runs the project's test/lint/type-check commands through a caller-injected runner, then turns the REAL captured output into a TYPED failure report (shortest reproducer, message, root cause), grouped by cause. Execution stays in YOUR sandbox (no shell spawned by the agent); reports, never fixes.

agents.title: Database Query Reviewer
agents.description: Database Query Reviewer — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Dependency Auditor
agents.description: Dependency Auditor — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Dev Implementer
agents.description: Proposes a TYPED minimal patch plan (file changes with full new contents + PR title + notes) that makes the QA specs pass. Proposes, never writes (the plan is data you apply); optional openPr transport turns the approved plan into a real PR, fail-closed HITL. House rules: named exports, Zod at boundaries, no any.

agents.title: Feature Flag Reviewer
agents.description: Feature Flag Reviewer — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: i18n Reviewer
agents.description: i18n Reviewer — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Incident Postmortem
agents.description: Incident Postmortem — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Issue Creator
agents.description: Drafts one TYPED GitHub issue per PRD acceptance criterion, then creates them through a caller-injected createIssue transport. Real creation or honest draft (no transport => drafts + created:[], never a faked number); fail-closed HITL (no approve + autoApprove off => nothing created); reports the real issue number/url.

agents.title: License Compliance
agents.description: License Compliance — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Migration Planner
agents.description: Migration Planner — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Monorepo Impact Analyzer
agents.description: Monorepo Impact Analyzer — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Observability Gap Finder
agents.description: Observability Gap Finder — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: On-call Handoff
agents.description: On-call Handoff — typed output agent (draft spec).
agents.output: Handoff typed: incidents, risks, next steps

agents.title: Performance Interpreter
agents.description: Performance Interpreter — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: PRD Author
agents.description: Transforms a free-form product description into a TYPED PRD (problem, users, 3-5 testable acceptance criteria, out-of-scope, open questions). Never invents business logic — anything absent from the input becomes an open question. Always a draft.

agents.title: QA Author
agents.description: Turns a PRD's acceptance criteria into TYPED Vitest spec stubs (one+ describe/it block per criterion, each referencing its number). Returns { specs: [{ path, body, criteria }] } and flags uncovered criteria rather than silently dropping coverage.

agents.title: Release Notes Drafter
agents.description: Turns the list of merged PRs since the last tag into TYPED, grouped release notes (Feature/Fix/Performance/Docs/Internal) + a ready-to-paste markdown block. Every entry cites its PR number; never invents a merge not in the input. Always a draft for the release manager.

agents.title: Runbook from Incident
agents.description: Runbook from Incident — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: SBOM Generator
agents.description: SBOM Generator — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Security Scanner Interpreter
agents.description: Security Scanner Interpreter — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Tech Debt Scorer
agents.description: Tech Debt Scorer — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Test Runner
agents.description: Parses raw Vitest stdout/stderr into a TYPED test report: totals + per-failure details (test, file, message, one-sentence root-cause hypothesis), grouped by suspected cause. Analyses captured output; does not execute anything itself. Reports only what the output shows, never invents.

agents.description: Breach Notification BR — typed output agent (draft spec).

Typed risk verdict + human sign-off.

Two modes (fraud / aml SAR-ready); always a draft for human review, fail-safe (insufficientEvidence over false positives), never freezes accounts or files SARs.

agents.title: Case Analyst
agents.description: Extracts a TYPED structured analysis from a case file (parties, venue, posture, claims, defenses, key dates, open discovery). Every datum cites its source document + page; gaps are 'not in record' (never inferred); SOL/filing-deadline risks surfaced separately. Always a draft for the attorney.

agents.title: Case Summariser
agents.description: Produces a TYPED, court-ready matter summary from reviewed documents + reviewer notes. Every factual claim cites the underlying document ID; inconsistent notes are flagged as conflicts (competing positions surfaced) rather than resolved by picking a side. Always a draft for the attorney.

agents.title: Clause Comparator
agents.description: Clause Comparator — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Deposition Prep
agents.description: Deposition Prep — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Doc Drafter
agents.description: Drafts a legal document (memo / motion / demand-letter / client-update) from an approved fact pattern. Cites every factual claim to its source record; flags every inference inline + in a typed list for attorney verification; ALWAYS a draft (never final, never a signature) ending with open questions for sign-off.

agents.title: Legal Doc Reviewer
agents.description: One configurable legal-review agent (mode: contract | discovery | privilege) that supersedes the separate contract-reviewer, discovery-reviewer, and privilege-spotter. Produces typed findings via structured output; privileged/high findings require attorney review.

agents.description: Obligation Tracker — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Redaction Bot
agents.description: Redacts PII from a legal document with a DETERMINISTIC backstop (createPIIRedactor strips any structured identifier the model missed — SSN/email/phone + your gov-ID/account rules), and surfaces privileged spans for attorney review instead of silently redacting them. Output is always clean of the covered patterns.

agents.description: Regulatory Filing Drafter — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.description: Attribution Interpreter — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Brand Compliance
agents.description: Brand Compliance — typed output agent (draft spec).

agents.title: Brief Analyst
agents.description: Reads an incoming campaign brief and produces a TYPED structured brief (objective/audience/key messages/tone/channels/timeline/mandatories) downstream agents reference. Never invents client details; missing required fields listed in gaps (ask, don't guess); optional voice guide flags conflicting language.

agents.title: Calendar Digest Author
agents.description: Turns the week's scheduled social posts into a TYPED digest (per-channel groups + a ready-to-paste Slack markdown block). Delivery is optional and HITL-gated — reported delivered only when the transport really returned an id; never fakes a post.

agents.title: Competitor Researcher
agents.description: Searches + fetches competitor web content (webSearch / fetchUrl), diffs it against the RAG competitor baseline, and produces a structured competitive-landscape report. Hardened: fetched pages are treated as attacker-controlled data (prompt-injection defense), and unfetchable sources are flagged, never fabricated.

agents.title: Copy Author
agents.description: Produces exactly THREE distinct TYPED copy variants (bold / warm / precise) from a structured brief + competitive context — each with headline/subheadline/body/cta/channel/persona/rationale. Every metric must come from the brief (no invented numbers); over-length bodies flagged, not silently cut.

agents.title: Social Publisher
agents.description: Formats one approved copy variant per platform and DELIVERS it through caller-injected transports. Real delivery or honest failure (no faked sends), fail-closed HITL (nothing posts without explicit approval), typed result with the real provider id per platform.

agents.title: Escalation Drafter
agents.description: Turns a ticket + agent notes into a TYPED internal escalation draft (impact / tried / need / SLA). A deterministic PII backstop re-scans every field and strips raw email / phone / ids the model leaked; always a draft for the agent to review before posting.

agents.title: KB Searcher
agents.description: Matches a support ticket to the top knowledge-base articles as TYPED hits with a 1-5 confidence score. Optional retriever grounds answers in YOUR corpus — only retrieved candidates can be cited; never invents an article (returns noMatch + a suggested topic instead).

agents.title: Triage Bot
agents.description: Classifies an inbound support ticket by topic + severity (P1-P4) + queue with TYPED output, and a deterministic red-flag net that forces P1 on outage / data-loss / security language (the model can only raise severity, never bury a P1).
